description: Playbook adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

notes: This adapter keeps a project-scoped exception for the Playbook changelog-generator rollout; mutations outside the explicit allowlist still fail closed.
Fresh worktrees do not carry repo-local node_modules, so verification bootstrap runs before declared verify commands.
If command or workflow state changes inside the allowed surfaces, also run pnpm agents:update and pnpm agents:check before promotion.

docsUpdateRules: This adapter exception exists only for the changelog-generator rollout. Keep mutations inside the explicit allowlist and do not widen to broad package, workflow, or docs globs.

If command or workflow state changes inside this rollout, keep docs/CHANGELOG-GENERATOR.md, docs/RELEASING.md, and docs/CHANGELOG.md aligned in the same change or immediately after. Broader Playbook docs updates require an explicit scope expansion.
Do not edit _stack, Atlas, Lifeline, or Fitness from Playbook tasks launched through this adapter.
Prefer Playbook command outputs over broad repository inference when command coverage exists.
